phases.name: Foundation
phases.description: Build the core systems, validate products on eBay/Marketplace, establish AI workflows, launch first content. Get the machine running.

phases.name: Scale
phases.description: Automate product research, scale winning listings to Shopify, deploy AI agents for content and operations, build recurring revenue streams.

phases.name: Autonomy
phases.description: Full autonomous operation. AI agents handle research, content, and operations. Human oversight on strategy only. Sell the system itself.

marketing.title: Marketing Blueprint
marketing.objective: Build organic reach through AI-powered content, product research signals, and community engagement. Zero ad spend until product-market fit confirmed.

north_star.statement: Every piece of content is a seed. Plant systematically, measure ruthlessly, double down on what grows.
principles: Content-first marketing. No paid ads until organic proves the market.
Every eBay listing is a market test. Data feeds strategy.
Build in public. Share the journey, attract the tribe.
Spanish-first for PR market, English for global scale.
AI generates volume. Human curates quality.

framework.description: The Content Flywheel. Content creates attention, attention creates data, data improves content.

steps.name: Research
steps.detail: Google Trends, eBay sold data, competitor analysis

steps.name: Create
steps.detail: AI-assisted content generation across all channels

steps.name: Distribute
steps.detail: Multi-platform posting. Reels, TikTok, Telegram, Shopify blog

steps.name: Measure
steps.detail: Track engagement, conversion, and revenue per content piece

steps.name: Optimize
steps.detail: Kill underperformers, scale winners, feed data back to research

assets.name: Content Calendar
assets.description: Weekly posting schedule across all platforms

assets.name: Brand Voice Guide
assets.description: Tone, style, vocabulary guidelines for Behique

assets.name: Hashtag Library
assets.description: Tested hashtag sets per platform and niche

assets.name: Thumbnail Templates
assets.description: Proven thumbnail formats for video content

guardrails: No paid advertising until 1000 organic followers on primary platform
Every content piece must have a clear CTA
Spanish and English versions for all core content
48-hour content review before publishing strategy pieces
Track ROI per content type monthly

sales.title: Sales Blueprint
sales.objective: Test products on eBay and Facebook Marketplace. Scale winners to Shopify. Build digital product revenue through Gumroad. Multiple income streams feeding one system.

north_star.statement: Sell before you build. Validate with real money, then invest in winners.
principles: eBay is the testing ground. Shopify is the scale platform.
Every product gets 30 days to prove itself or gets cut.
Digital products (ebooks, templates, blueprints) have infinite margin.
Price for value, not for competition.
Automate the pipeline, humanize the relationship.

framework.description: The Product Validation Pipeline. Find, test, scale, automate.

steps.name: Source
steps.detail: Google Trends scraper, eBay sold data, competitor watching

steps.name: List
steps.detail: Create eBay/FB Marketplace listings with AI-optimized copy

steps.name: Test
steps.detail: 30-day validation period. Track views, watchers, sales

steps.name: Score
steps.detail: Product scoring algorithm. margin, velocity, competition

steps.name: Scale
steps.detail: Winners move to Shopify. Losers get cut. No emotions.

assets.name: Product Research Database
assets.description: Scored product candidates with market data

assets.name: Listing Templates
assets.description: Optimized eBay/Shopify listing formats

assets.name: Pricing Calculator
assets.description: Margin analysis with fees and shipping

assets.name: Supplier Directory
assets.description: Verified suppliers with lead times and MOQs

guardrails: Minimum 30% margin after all fees or product gets dropped
No inventory purchase over $200 without 3+ validation signals
Digital products ship same day, physical within 48 hours
Weekly P&L review, every single product
Kill slow movers after 30 days, no exceptions

operations.title: Operations Map
operations.objective: Run the entire business with minimal friction. Two machines (Ceiba + Cobo), synced memory, automated workflows, clear processes for every repeatable task.

north_star.statement: If you do it twice, automate it. If you can not automate it, document it. If you can not document it, simplify it.
principles: Every process gets documented before it gets delegated.
Two-machine architecture. Ceiba (M4) for brain work, Cobo (GTX 1080 Ti) for compute.
Syncthing keeps shared-memory.md as single source of truth.
Pre-build gate. Every project answers WHY before touching code.
Weekly system audit. Kill dead weight, fix broken connectors.

framework.description: The Operations Flow. Inputs become outputs through documented, repeatable processes.

assets.name: Memory Stack
assets.description: CLAUDE.md + primer.md + context.md + vault

assets.name: Process Library
assets.description: SOPs for every repeatable operation

assets.name: Bridge Protocol
assets.description: Cross-machine task delegation via bridge/

assets.name: System Audit Checklist
assets.description: Weekly health check for all systems

guardrails: Pre-build gate: every new project must answer WHO, WHY, WHAT, HOW
Connector-first policy. New tools must integrate before they are adopted.
59% dead weight threshold. If over half the system is unused, audit.
Session protocol. primer.md gets rewritten every single session.
No orphan projects. Every project tracked in VAULT_INDEX.md.

finance.title: Financial Blueprint
finance.objective: Track every dollar in, every dollar out. Maintain positive cash flow. Reinvest profits into growth. Build toward financial independence through multiple revenue streams.

north_star.statement: Revenue is vanity. Profit is sanity. Cash flow is reality.
principles: Track P&L per product, per channel, per week.
Reinvest 60% of profits into inventory and tools.
Keep monthly fixed costs under $100 until revenue exceeds $2K.
Digital products are the margin play. Physical is the volume play.
Family is the why. Financial freedom is the how.

framework.description: Revenue stack. Multiple streams feeding one central account.

steps.name: eBay Sales
steps.detail: Physical product testing and validation revenue

steps.name: Shopify Store
steps.detail: Scaled winners, branded experience

steps.name: Gumroad Digital
steps.detail: Ebooks, templates, blueprints. Infinite margin.

steps.name: n8n Agency
steps.detail: AI automation services for businesses

steps.name: Content Monetization
steps.detail: Future. Sponsorships, affiliates, courses

assets.name: Monthly P&L Template
assets.description: Revenue, COGS, fees, profit per stream

assets.name: Product Margin Calculator
assets.description: All-in cost including platform fees, shipping

assets.name: Cash Flow Projection
assets.description: 12-month forecast by revenue stream

guardrails: No expense over $50 without ROI justification
Monthly fixed costs cap: $100 until $2K revenue
Weekly financial review every Monday
Emergency fund: maintain 2 months of fixed costs
Every tool must pay for itself within 60 days

ai_automations.title: AI & Automations Blueprint
ai_automations.objective: Build an AI-native business where agents handle research, content, operations, and communication. Human sets direction. Machines execute. The system learns and improves.

north_star.statement: AI is not a feature. It is the operating system. Every business function runs through an intelligent layer that learns, adapts, and executes.
principles: AI-first, not AI-added. Every workflow starts with 'can an agent do this?'
Three-layer architecture: Brain (planning), Hands (execution), Memory (context).
Local-first when possible (Ollama), cloud when necessary (Claude, GPT).
Human-in-the-loop for strategy. AI autonomous for execution.
The system teaches itself. Every session improves the next.

framework.description: The AI Operating System. How tasks flow from human intent to autonomous execution.

steps.name: Intent
steps.detail: Human defines objective and constraints

steps.name: Planning
steps.detail: Claude/Ceiba breaks task into subtasks, assigns agents

steps.name: Execution
steps.detail: Agents run via MCP servers, bridge, n8n workflows

steps.name: Review
steps.detail: Human reviews output, provides feedback

steps.name: Learning
steps.detail: System stores patterns, improves prompts, updates memory

agent_roles.name: Ceiba (Core Agent)
agent_roles.role: Primary thinking partner, planning, code generation, memory management. Runs on Claude via Claude Code.

agent_roles.name: Cobo (Compute Agent)
agent_roles.role: GPU-powered tasks. Local LLM inference, heavy scraping, video processing. Connected via bridge protocol.

agent_roles.name: BehiqueBot (Accountability Agent)
agent_roles.role: Telegram bot. Captures ideas, classifies by category and pillar, sends check-ins. Built on psychologist framework.

agent_roles.name: Research Agent
agent_roles.role: Product discovery, trend analysis, competitor monitoring. Feeds the sales pipeline.

agent_roles.name: Content Agent
agent_roles.role: Generates marketing content, social posts, product descriptions. Human reviews before publish.

prompts: Analyze Google Trends data for niche product opportunities
Score product viability based on margin, competition, demand
Generate eBay listing copy optimized for search
Compare supplier pricing and calculate true landed cost
Write social media post series for product launch
Generate video script for product review (60s format)
Create SEO-optimized blog post from research notes
Build email sequence for new subscriber onboarding
Generate morning briefing from overnight metrics
Audit system health and identify broken connectors
Create SOP documentation from process description
Triage incoming ideas into actionable tasks
Analyze last 30 days and recommend next moves
Compare revenue streams and suggest reallocation
Generate quarterly goal breakdown with milestones

memory_system.description: Persistent context across sessions. The AI never starts from zero.

layers.purpose: Static rules, identity, project list, frameworks
Live session state. Rewritten every session.
Big picture vision, goals, WHY behind work
Master index of all projects and infrastructure
Pattern recognition, session history, behavioral notes

safety_rails: Pre-build gate: every new feature answers WHO, WHY, WHAT before code
Human-in-the-loop for all publishing and financial decisions
Audit trail via git commits and project_memory.md
No autonomous spending. All purchases require human approval.
Weekly system audit catches drift before it compounds
Local-first processing for sensitive data (Ollama, not cloud)
Session protocol ensures nothing gets lost between conversations

tech_stack.name: Claude / Claude Code
tech_stack.role: Primary AI brain and coding agent

tech_stack.name: Ollama
tech_stack.role: Local LLM for privacy-sensitive and compute tasks

tech_stack.name: n8n
tech_stack.role: Visual workflow automation and API orchestration

tech_stack.name: MCP Servers
tech_stack.role: Tool access layer for Claude Code agents

assets.name: Memory Stack
assets.description: 7-file persistent context system

assets.name: Prompt Library
assets.description: Categorized prompt templates for all functions

assets.name: Agent Configurations
assets.description: Spawn configs for each agent type

assets.name: n8n Workflow Library
assets.description: Reusable automation templates

assets.name: MCP Server Registry
assets.description: Available tool servers and capabilities

guardrails: AI suggests, human decides on strategy
Every AI-generated output gets human review before external use
No API keys in code. Environment variables only.
Rate limiting on all external API calls
Fallback to manual process if automation fails
Document every new automation in process library

content.title: Content Strategy Blueprint
content.objective: Build a content engine that runs on AI assistance and human curation. Create once, distribute everywhere. Every piece serves the business, not just the algorithm.

north_star.statement: Content is the bridge between what you build and who needs it. Make it useful, make it authentic, make it relentless.
principles: Create once, distribute everywhere. One idea becomes 5+ content pieces.
Authenticity over polish. Real journey content outperforms generic advice.
AI generates drafts. Human adds soul and story.
Every content piece links to a product, service, or community.
Build in public. The process IS the content.

framework.description: The Content Multiplication Framework. One core idea becomes a content ecosystem.

steps.name: Core Idea
steps.detail: One insight, lesson, or discovery from real work

steps.name: Long Form
steps.detail: Blog post, video essay, or in-depth thread

steps.name: Short Form
steps.detail: Reels, TikToks, carousels from the long form

steps.name: Micro
steps.detail: Tweets, quotes, one-liners from the short form

steps.name: Evergreen
steps.detail: Best performers become templates, guides, products

tech_stack.name: CapCut
tech_stack.role: Video editing with AI effects and templates

assets.name: Content Calendar
assets.description: Weekly schedule across all platforms

assets.name: Script Templates
assets.description: Proven formats for hooks, stories, CTAs

assets.name: B-Roll Library
assets.description: Reusable footage organized by theme

assets.name: Thumbnail Playbook
assets.description: Click-tested formats and color schemes

assets.name: Content Swipe File
assets.description: Competitor content that performs well

guardrails: No publishing without clear CTA
Spanish and English versions for key content
Batch creation: produce 1 week of content in 1 session
Every video under 90 seconds unless educational deep-dive
Repurpose before creating net new
Track which content drives actual revenue, not just views

spokes.name: Systems
spokes.description: Repeatable processes that scale without you
items: Document every process as an SOP
Memory stack ensures zero context loss

spokes.name: Stories
spokes.description: Authentic narratives that attract your people

spokes.name: Questions
spokes.description: Curiosity-driven content that educates and sells
items: Create FAQ content from support interactions
Use questions as hooks for short-form video

spokes.name: Metaphors
spokes.description: Mental models that make complex ideas stick
items: Ceiba tree as the central connector

spokes.name: Mistakes
spokes.description: Lessons from failures that build trust and prevent repeats

funnel.label: Target Market
funnel.value: Solo entrepreneurs and small business owners who want AI-powered operations but lack technical skills

funnel.label: Core Pain
funnel.value: Overwhelmed by manual processes, missing sales because they cannot keep up, know AI exists but do not know how to implement it

funnel.label: Dream Outcome
funnel.value: A business that runs itself. AI handles research, content, and operations while they focus on strategy and growth.

funnel.label: Unique Mechanism
funnel.value: The Behique System. AI agents built on real business workflows, not theory. Tested on our own business first.

funnel.label: Key Features
funnel.value: Product research automation, AI content generation, autonomous operations workflows, persistent memory system

funnel.label: Deliverables
funnel.value: Business Blueprint (this document), n8n workflow templates, prompt libraries, agent configurations, setup guide

retention_hooks.name: Updates

tactics: Monthly blueprint updates with new sections
Workflow library grows with community input

retention_hooks.name: Gamification
